content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Gunzerker
description: Legendary Torgue class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker. Built around Lay Waste, All in the Reflexes, Last Longer, Yippee Ki Yay, Incite. Trades accuracy for raw gun damage and boosts action skill cooldown.
notes: A SHiFT reward version exists via the Diamond Plate Loot Chest. The item card may show incorrect stats. Do not confuse this with the Legendary Berserker class mod.

special.description: At max level: +60.5% gun damage, -46% accuracy, +51% action skill cooldown rate.
special.title: Nobody puts this baby in a corner.
